test case id: tc-trains-002 title: retrieve list of trains with empty result module: trains source pages: 7, 8 preconditions: no train list exists. test data: - no specific data required. test steps: 1. application requests the train list. 2. sistema gestione calendario forwards the request to sistema di gestione dei dati. 3. sistema di gestione dei dati requests trains from api trenitalia. 4. api trenitalia queries the database. 5. database returns an empty payload. 6. api trenitalia forwards the empty payload to sistema di gestione dei dati. 7. sistema di gestione dei dati forwards the empty payload to sistema gestione calendario. 8. sistema gestione calendario forwards the empty payload to application. 9. application checks if the list is null and displays accordingly. expected result: null is displayed since there are no trains.

test case id: tc-trains-003 title: delete a preferred train module: trains source pages: 8 preconditions: a preferred train exists. test data: - id: "123" test steps: 1. application requests to delete a preferred train. 2. sistema gestione calendario forwards the request to sistema di gestione dei dati. 3. sistema di gestione dei dati queries the api trenitalia. 4. api trenitalia deletes the train. 5. api trenitalia returns the status code. 6. sistema di gestione dei dati forwards the status code to sistema gestione calendario. 7. sistema gestione calendario forwards the status code to application. expected result: preferred train is deleted successfully.
